prompt: Please summarize this short note into two sentences. Keep it simple and clear.
Analyze our Q4 metrics across regions, compare cohort A vs B over time, and design an improved reporting plan for next quarter.
Please debug the onboarding script failures, refactor brittle steps, and implement structured logging for retries. This work involves confidential customer data, so take appropriate care.
Translate these product tags, list them alphabetically, and format the output as comma-separated values.
